steps.title: Find the new side length
steps.content:
A side length $70\%$ shorter is $30\%$ of the original side length:
$$
42(0.30)=12.6
$$

steps.title: Find the actual distance
steps.content:
The original side represents
$$
42(11)=462
$$
miles. The reduced map shows the same actual distance along its side.

steps.title: Compute miles per inch
steps.content: On the reduced map, $$ \frac{462}{12.6}=36.666 $$ Rounded to two decimal places, this is $36.67$. The answer is D.
